testcase.name: Antivirus Core Functions › Dashboard shows initial protected status
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › src/features/antivirus.feature.spec.js:6:3 › Antivirus Core Functions › Dashboard shows initial protected status › And the realtime protection toggle should be visible Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: locator('text=Tiempo Real') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: locator('text=Tiempo Real') resolved to 2 elements: 1) aka getByRole('button', { name: 'Tiempo Real' }) 2)

Tiempo Real

testcase.name: Antivirus Core Functions › Toggling realtime protection

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: Antivirus Core Functions › Sidebar navigation highlights active section
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › src/features/antivirus.feature.spec.js:53:3 › Antivirus Core Functions › Sidebar navigation highlights active section › Then the Scan section in the sidebar should be highlighted
Error: expect(locator).toHaveClass(expected) failed
Locator: locator('button:has-text("Escaneo")') Expected pattern: /text-\[var\(--accent-primary\)\]/ Error: strict mode violation: locator('button:has-text("Escaneo")') resolved to 3 elements: 1) <button class="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-md transition-all text-sm font-medium↵ bg-[var(--accent-primary)]/10 text-[var(--accent-primary)]">…</button> aka getByRole('button', { name: 'Escaneo', exact: true }) 2) <button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 p-6 rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--bg-panel)] hover:bg-[var(--bg-card)] disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors group">…</button> aka getByRole('button', { name: 'Escaneo Rápido Áreas críticas' }) 3) <button class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 p-6 rounded-xl border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--bg-panel)] hover:bg-[var(--bg-card)] disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors group">…</button> aka getByRole('button', { name: 'Escaneo Completo Todo el' })
Call log: - Expect "toHaveClass" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('button:has-text("Escaneo")')
at ../src/features/steps/antivirus.steps.js:88
86 | Then('the Scan section in the sidebar should be highlighted', async ({ page }) => { 87 | const button = page.locator('button:has-text("Escaneo")'); > 88 | await expect(button).toHaveClass(/text-\[var\(--accent-primary\)\]/); | ^ 89 | }); 90 | 91 | When('I navigate to the RealTime section', async ({ page }) => { at Object.<anonymous> (/home/runner/work/proyecto-si784-2026-i-u3-antivirus_u3_cds/proyecto-si784-2026-i-u3-antivirus_u3_cds/src/features/steps/antivirus.steps.js:88:24) at /home/runner/work/proyecto-si784-2026-i-u3-antivirus_u3_cds/proyecto-si784-2026-i-u3-antivirus_u3_cds/node_modules/playwright-bdd/src/runtime/bddStepInvoker.ts:60:60 at BddStepInvoker.invoke (/home/runner/work/proyecto-si784-2026-i-u3-antivirus_u3_cds/proyecto-si784-2026-i-u3-antivirus_u3_cds/node_modules/playwright-bdd/src/runtime/bddStepInvoker.ts:54:5) at /home/runner/work/proyecto-si784-2026-i-u3-antivirus_u3_cds/proyecto-si784-2026-i-u3-antivirus_u3_cds/.features-gen/src/features/antivirus.feature.spec.js:56:5
